name: bridge_case_01_single_limit
text: SYMBOL_PLACEHOLDER long entry ENTRY_1 sl STOP_LOSS tp1 TP_1

name: bridge_case_02_multi_limit
text: SYMBOL_PLACEHOLDER long entry ENTRY_1-ENTRY_2 sl STOP_LOSS tp1 TP_1 tp2 TP_2

name: bridge_case_03_market_then_limit
text: SYMBOL_PLACEHOLDER long market entry sl STOP_LOSS tp1 TP_1 tp2 TP_2
